title: Massad Thrumble

[[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] '''Massad Thrumble''' was an [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] [[Droid/Legends|droid]] researcher, working under [[Simonelle]], who succeeded in creating fully operational [[human replica droid]]s for numerous clients including [[Black Sun/Legends|Black Sun]] and the Empire. Some of the HRDs he created included [[Guri]],<ref name="TCSWE" /> as well as replicas of [[Frija Torlock]] and her father [[Lexhannen Torlock|Lexhannen]].

==History==
In his youth, Massad Thrumble worked for the Empire as a [[captain/Legends|Captain]] in a droid production plant. Eventually, he rose to the rank of [[Admiral/Legends|Admiral]] and was in charge of the research facility. There he was involved in the creation of Human replica droids such as Guri.<ref name="SEE1">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 1|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 1]]</ref>

Thrumble later retired, and as of [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]] he owned and operated a small [[Cantina/Legends|cantina]] on [[Hurd's Moon]]. He had a modified medical droid, [[A-OIC]], also known as Doc. Doc was stolen by the [[Pike Sisters|Pikkel Sisters]] on behalf of [[Spinda Caveel]] of [[Murninkam]]. Shortly after this, he was approached by Guri, who wanted him to reprogram her. Thrumble saw it a challenge more interesting that money, however he told Guri that only with Doc he cold perform that operation.<ref name="SEE1" /> Not long after, he was approached by the [[bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Kar Yang]], who was hired by [[Savan]], niece of [[Prince/Legends|Prince]] [[Xizor/Legends|Xizor]], to capture Guri. Thrumble at first claimed ignorance, and his thugs started moving against the intruder; but seeing everyone felled down by the gigantic [[Hiitian/Legends|Hiitian]], Thrumble directed him to Murninkam.<ref name="SEE2">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 2|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 2]]</ref>

Guri was successful and returned to Thrumble from Murninkam with the droid. Thrumble warned her that if the procedure wouldn't kill her, she would still survive changed, and Guri insisted. However, she had been pursued. Yang interrupted Thrumble before he could begin the operation on Guri, and obliged her to neutralize Thrumble in order to follow him; but Guri fought and killed him. Thrumble did some recalibrations while Doc removed and disposed Yang's body.<ref name="SEE3">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 3|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 3]]</ref>

After the incident Thrumble upgraded the automatic defenses of his protected area, and although there were attempts from other groups to approach Guri, it was proven impossible, as [[Skahtul]] related to [[Savan]]. The procedure resumed with Doc cautioning about the danger of damaging her neurocortex; later the droid expressed success with the progress of the binhex sequence, but Thrumble pointed out that her brain was too complex to ensure success.<ref name="SEE4">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 4|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 4]]</ref>

Three more groups traveled to Hurd's Moon. The first was Caveel and the Pikkel Sisters, who wanted to take back Doc. The second was Savan, and the third was the [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]], who were following Savan. All of them while he and Doc performed the operation to remove Guri's memories.<ref name="SEE5">[[Shadows of the Empire: Evolution 5|''Shadows of the Empire: Evolution'' 5]]</ref>

Thrumble's defenses held off Savan and her mercenaries and he understood that someone was still after her. With Guri free from her past, Thrumble led her to another room and tried to flee with her. In a security room, Thrumble saw the Pike Sisters (whom Guri had forgotten) and the famous [[Heroes of Yavin/Legends|Heroes of Yavin]], and told Guri they were all probably after her.

Guri ensured him that she was still able to pilot her ship, the ''[[Stinger]]'', and on their way to it, she suffered from a sudden [[headache/Legends|headache]] and Thrumble helped her walk. They were spotted by [[Prevaro]], Savan's lieutenant, and ordered their [[mercenary/Legends|mercenaries]] against them. But Guri remembered her fighting abilities and defeated the thugs. They then encountered Savan herself, who tried to take control of Guri using a code phrase she learned from Xizor. Savan ordered Guri to kill Thrumble, but the code phrase did not work, and she instead punched and threw her down.<ref name="SEE5" />

Later Thrumble explained to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] that the bad parts of her memory [[memory wipe/Legends|were wiped]], and they let her go in peace.<ref name="SEE5" />
